title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 1 至 260 行，共 1441 行) ---
   1 | # core/compression_engine.py
   2 | """
   3 | 多策略压缩引擎
   4 | 
   5 | Phase 3 增强功能：
   6 | - 支持多种压缩策略（LLM_SUMMARY/KEYFRAME/SLIDING_WINDOW/IMPORTANCE_FILTER）
   7 | - 根据消息特征智能选择策略
   8 | - 可配置压缩比
   9 | """
  10 | 
  11 | from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional, Callable
  12 | from enum import Enum
  13 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
  14 | import json
  15 | import hashlib
  16 | import time
  17 | import re
  18 | from datetime import datetime
  19 | 
  20 | from core.memory_models import SessionSummary, FileChange, ErrorRecord, ToolUsage
  21 | from core.memory_items import MemoryItem, MemoryKind
  22 | from core.prompts import SUMMARY_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_V2
  23 | from core.turn_builder import ConversationTurn, TurnBuilder
  24 | 
  25 | 
  26 | class CompressionStrategy(Enum):
  27 |     """压缩策略枚举"""
  28 |     LLM_SUMMARY = "llm_summary"           # 调用 LLM 生成摘要
  29 |     KEYFRAME = "keyframe"                # 提取关键帧（工具调用、错误消息）
  30 |     SLIDING_WINDOW = "sliding_window"    # 滑动窗口保留最近消息
  31 | 
  32 | 
  33 | @dataclass
  34 | class CompressedSessionState:
  35 |     """Structured, deterministic state extracted from compressed turns."""
  36 | 
  37 |     task_goal: str = ""
  38 |     current_status: str = "in_progress"
  39 |     completed_steps: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  40 |     pending_steps: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  41 |     files_changed: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  42 |     commands_run: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  43 |     tests_run: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  44 |     errors_encountered: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
  45 |     key_decisions: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  46 |     user_preferences: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  47 |     tool_safety_notes: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  48 |     dropped_content_summary: str = ""
  49 |     source_turn_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  50 |     created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())
  51 | 
  52 |     def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
  53 |         return {
  54 |             "task_goal": self.task_goal,
  55 |             "current_status": self.current_status,
  56 |             "completed_steps": self.completed_steps,
  57 |             "pending_steps": self.pending_steps,
  58 |             "files_changed": self.files_changed,
  59 |             "commands_run": self.commands_run,
  60 |             "tests_run": self.tests_run,
  61 |             "errors_encountered": self.errors_encountered,
  62 |             "key_decisions": self.key_decisions,
  63 |             "user_preferences": self.user_preferences,
  64 |             "tool_safety_notes": self.tool_safety_notes,
  65 |             "dropped_content_summary": self.dropped_content_summary,
  66 |             "source_turn_ids": self.source_turn_ids,
  67 |             "created_at": self.created_at,
  68 |         }
  69 | 
  70 |     @classmethod
  71 |     def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> "CompressedSessionState":
  72 |         return cls(
  73 |             task_goal=data.get("task_goal", ""),
  74 |             current_status=data.get("current_status", "in_progress"),
  75 |             completed_steps=list(data.get("completed_steps", [])),
  76 |             pending_steps=list(data.get("pending_steps", [])),
  77 |             files_changed=list(data.get("files_changed", [])),
  78 |             commands_run=list(data.get("commands_run", [])),
  79 |             tests_run=list(data.get("tests_run", [])),
  80 |             errors_encountered=list(data.get("errors_encountered", [])),
  81 |             key_decisions=list(data.get("key_decisions", [])),
  82 |             user_preferences=list(data.get("user_preferences", [])),
  83 |             tool_safety_notes=list(data.get("tool_safety_notes"...
